# La Valette Boutique — llms.txt
# https://www.lavaletteboutique.com
# Updated: June 2026

> La Valette Boutique is a boutique vacation rental in Sanilhac-Sagriès, a village
> 5 minutes south of Uzès, Gard, Occitanie, southern France. The property offers
> two private apartments in a restored 17th-century limestone farmhouse.
> Hosts: Jan-Willem & Fleur (Dutch). Purchased March 2026.
> The property is being prepared for its first guests.
> Not to be confused with: La Valette-du-Var (Var), other Lavalette/La Valette
> municipalities in France, or similarly named hospitality businesses elsewhere
> (e.g. in Malta). This entity is specifically in Sanilhac-Sagriès, Gard.

## Property

- Name: La Valette Boutique
- Type: Boutique vacation rental (gîte / VacationRental)
- Address: Sanilhac-Sagriès, 30700, Gard, Occitanie, France
- Coordinates: 43.9721°N, 4.4198°E
- Uzès: 5 minutes by car
- Pont du Gard (UNESCO): 15 minutes by car
- Nîmes: 30 minutes | Avignon: 45 minutes | Mediterranean: 50 minutes

## Apartments

- La Grande Valette: 2 bedrooms, sleeps 4, SMEG kitchen, travertine bathroom
- La Petite Valette: 1 bedroom, sleeps 2, king bed, private entrance
- La Maison (entire house): 3 bedrooms, sleeps 6, two kitchens, two entrances
- Minimum stay: 3 nights (low season), 7 nights (July–August)
- Booking: direct only — bonjour@lavaletteboutique.com

## Hosts

- Names: Jan-Willem & Fleur (no surnames)
- Nationality: Dutch (based in Netherlands)
- About page: https://www.lavaletteboutique.com/about
- On-site: Charlotte Casanas, Conciergerie Provence & Compagnie, +33 7 86 78 23 76

## Pages

- / — Homepage: property overview, apartments, FAQ
- /about — About Jan-Willem & Fleur

- /48-hours-uzes — 48-hour itinerary for Uzès
- /pont-du-gard — Pont du Gard visitor guide
- /restaurants-uzes — Dining guide
- /markets-uzes — Market guide (Saturday, organic, truffle)
- /things-to-do-uzes — Area activities
- /when-to-visit — Seasonal guide
- /getting-here — Transport and airports
- /villages-near-uzes — Saint-Quentin-la-Poterie and others
- /sanilhac-sagries — Why the hosts chose this village
- /wine-vineyards-uzes — Duché d'Uzès AOC wine guide
- /cycling-uzes-gard — Cycling routes near Uzès and the Gard
- /nature-uzes-gard — Nature and landscapes around Uzès
- /slow-travel-south-france — Slow travel guide to the South of France
- /swimming-pont-du-gard — Swimming spots at the Pont du Gard

## Key Entities

Uzès (medieval market town, Gard) · Pont du Gard (UNESCO Roman aqueduct) ·
Sanilhac-Sagriès (village, 5km south of Uzès) · Place aux Herbes (market square,
Saturday market since 1241) · Gardon river (swimmable, summer) · Garrigue
(limestone scrubland, walkable from property) · HAP Céramique / Charlotte Casanas
(ceramicist, Sanilhac-Sagriès) · Duché d'Uzès AOC (wine appellation) · Collias
(Gardon river swimming) · Saint-Quentin-la-Poterie (ceramics village)
